kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://192.168.5.19:1600/api/Filing/CheckFilingDoubling path_url=/api/Filing/CheckFilingDoubling headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': 'application/json, text/plain, */*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'bearer eyJhbGciOiJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAxLzA0L3htbGRzaWctbW9yZSNobWFjLXNoYTI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..aLWUvkF54sEOx_KsbJ_X0wC26UOgAVokhbK2hIKkiq8', 'Cookie': 'eyJhbGciOiJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAxLzA0L3htbGRzaWctbW9yZSNobWFjLXNoYTI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..aLWUvkF54sEOx_KsbJ_X0wC26UOgAVokhbK2hIKkiq8', 'charset': 'utf-8', 'Content-Length': '169'} body=b'{"checkDoublingDto": {"nationalCode": "1131971019", "firstName": "\\u0631\\u0636\\u0627", "lastName": "\\u0635\\u062f\\u0641\\u064a", "fatherName": "\\u0635\\u0627\\u062f\\u0642"}}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.arg: ❌ NO RESPONSE | API:CheckFilingDoubling | Possible Network/Server Issue

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.arg: msg=❌ BUSINESS STATUS ERROR | API:CheckFilingDoubling | Expected statusCode=0 | Actual=${json["statusCode"]}
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Fail
kw.msg: ❌ FAIL CheckFilingDoubling Unexpected HTTP Status=500 ❌ Patient already admitted !!!
kw.arg:
❌ FAIL 
 CheckFilingDoubling 
 Unexpected HTTP Status=${http_status} 
 ❌ Patient already admitted !!!
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
